PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that he did not know whose children the eight Nephews and Nieces were, that it was the Public Administrator's practice to send notice to all Parties as they may have priority and that they hired a Japanese translator. In addition, he stated that the share of the Brother with the unknown Daughter may go to the state. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Continued To Jan-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
